description_long: This object is a short sword with a straight, double-edged blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade is dark in color, possibly blackened steel, and features a gold decorative marking or inscription near the hilt. The crossguard is relatively simple, colored in a muted gold or brass tone, and extends horizontally to protect the hand. The handle is cylindrical, wrapped or colored in a deep blue, and ends in a flat pommel. The overall design is utilitarian with a touch of ornamentation, suggesting it could be ceremonial or for display as well as functional use.
description: A straight, double-edged short sword with a dark blade, gold crossguard, and blue handle, featuring gold ornamentation near the hilt.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the dark blade, gold crossguard, and blue handle, with visible gold ornamentation on the blade.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blade and the rectangular cross-section of the handle and guard.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the blade, crossguard, and handle, but with less visible ornamentation detail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness of the blade and the handle's profile.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, blue, possibly wrapped, flat pommel
attribute_ornamentation: gold inscription or marking on blade
